title: Basilica of St. John de Britto
tagline: Basilica of St. John de Britto — spiritual town of Tamil Nadu

heroImage.alt: Basilica of St. John de Britto, Tamil Nadu

overview.short: Basilica of St. John de Britto is a much-loved spiritual town in Tamil Nadu, known for temples and pilgrimage.
overview.description: The Basilica of St. John de Britto is a Catholic church and pilgrimage centre in Tamil Nadu. The church was built over the site of the martyrdom of St. John de Britto in Oriyur.

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Oriyur Pudhuvayal
topPlaces.description: Pudhuvayal, also known as Oriyur Pudhuvayal and was historically known as Udayanar Samuthram, is a small village in Tamil Nadu, India. It is located in the Tiruvadanai taluk of Ramanathapuram district, and comes under the administration of the Orur panchayat.

topPlaces.name: Orur
topPlaces.description: Orur (sometimes spelled Oriyur or Oreiour) is a small village located in Tiruvadanai taluk, Ramanathapuram district, Tamil Nadu, India. It is situated 35 km from Devakottai, Sivagangai.

topPlaces.name: Virutthapurisvarar Temple, Annavasal
topPlaces.description: Virutthapurisvarar Temple is a Siva temple in Annavasal in Pudukottai district in Tamil Nadu (India).

topPlaces.name: Thiruppunavayil
topPlaces.description: The Thiruppunavayil Shiva temple is located on the seashore in Thiruppunavasal near Pudukkotai in Tamil Nadu. This temple is regarded as the 7th of the Tevara Stalams in the Pandya region of Tamil Nadu.

topPlaces.name: Thiruppunavasal
topPlaces.description: Thiruppunavasal is a coastal village in the Avadaiyarkoil Taluk of Pudukkottai District, Tamil Nadu, India.

topPlaces.name: Theeyathur Sahasralakshmeeswarar Temple
topPlaces.description: Sahasralakshmeeswarar Temple is a Shiva temple situated at Theeyathur alias Theeyathur Vadakottai neighbourhood in Pudukkottai district of Tamil Nadu state in India. The main deity is Sahasralakshmeeswarar and goddess is Periyanayaki in this temple.

topPlaces.name: Thondi
topPlaces.description: Thondi (தொண்டி) is a town located in the Ramanathapuram district of the southern Indian state of Tamil Nadu. It is about 25 km from Tiruvadanai.

items.note: Pudhuvayal, also known as Oriyur Pudhuvayal and was historically known as Udayanar Samuthram, is a small village in Tamil Nadu, India. It is located in the Tiruvadanai taluk of Ramanathapuram district, and comes under the administration of the Orur panchayat.
Orur (sometimes spelled Oriyur or Oreiour) is a small village located in Tiruvadanai taluk, Ramanathapuram district, Tamil Nadu, India. It is situated 35 km from Devakottai, Sivagangai.
Virutthapurisvarar Temple is a Siva temple in Annavasal in Pudukottai district in Tamil Nadu (India).

The Thiruppunavayil Shiva temple is located on the seashore in Thiruppunavasal near Pudukkotai in Tamil Nadu. This temple is regarded as the 7th of the Tevara Stalams in the Pandya region of Tamil Nadu.
Thiruppunavasal is a coastal village in the Avadaiyarkoil Taluk of Pudukkottai District, Tamil Nadu, India.

Sahasralakshmeeswarar Temple is a Shiva temple situated at Theeyathur alias Theeyathur Vadakottai neighbourhood in Pudukkottai district of Tamil Nadu state in India. The main deity is Sahasralakshmeeswarar and goddess is Periyanayaki in this temple.
Thondi (தொண்டி) is a town located in the Ramanathapuram district of the southern Indian state of Tamil Nadu. It is about 25 km from Tiruvadanai.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Basilica of St. John de Britto?
faq.a: The best time to visit Basilica of St. John de Britto is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Basilica of St. John de Britto?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Madurai Airport (105 km) and the nearest railway station is Madurai Junction (102 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Basilica of St. John de Britto?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Basilica of St. John de Britto at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Basilica of St. John de Britto?
faq.a: Stays in Basilica of St. John de Britto start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Basilica of St. John de Britto?
faq.a: The top attractions are Oriyur Pudhuvayal, Orur, Virutthapurisvarar Temple, Annavasal, Thiruppunavayil, Thiruppunavasal.
